title: cota oretana
intro: Cota oretana, also known as New Zealand thistle or Cota, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its prickly stems and purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cota oretana include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Cota oretana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
